summary: Move edit actions into document header
description: Because edit mode autosaves, remove Save/Cancel from the bottom footer and place them in the top document action row near Read/Open/navigation. Keep footer as passive path/save-state only.
acceptance: In edit mode Save and Cancel render in the top header action row; editor footer contains only path/save status; existing save/cancel handlers still bind; browser smoke verifies button positions and no footer actions.
verification: npm --workspace apps/desktop run build; npm run check; browser DOM/vision smoke

evidence.summary: Moved edit-mode Save/Cancel from bottom editor footer into top document header action row. Footer now contains only path and save-state. Verification: npm --workspace apps/desktop run build; browser DOM smoke blank=false saveInHeader=true cancelInHeader=true footerButtonCount=0 saveAboveFooter=true; browser visual smoke; npm run check; go validate.
